score_semantics_note: fusion_ranking_score is not a calibrated probability; v2_scoreline_probability comes from V2 Dixon-Coles; eventflow_ranking_score is a non-probabilistic EventFlow ranking score.

semantics.v2_scoreline_probability: calibrated scoreline probability from V2 Dixon-Coles
semantics.fusion_ranking_score: normalized ranking score, not a calibrated probability

prematch_source_summary.summary: Scotland top Group C after 1-0 Haiti; Morocco 1-1 Brazil; knockout path stakes for both.
Morocco favored -130; defensive structure and Brazil draw show elite tournament level vs Scotland limited WC pedigree.
Scotland may defend deep if trailing to protect GD; Morocco wait-and-strike transition style.
Morocco R1: high press direct style; 49% poss xG 1.37; Saibari goal; competitive vs Brazil.
Scotland R1: direct set-piece approach; 46% possession xG 1.05; narrow win vs Haiti.
Morocco expect to dominate ball; Scotland working on better possession after Haiti.

excluded_evidence_summary.summary: Referee Ilgiz Tantashev (UZB) confirmed for Gillette Stadium.
Scotland can reach 6 pts; Morocco needs points; possible late draw acceptance if level.

source_summary_deprecated.summary: Scotland top Group C after 1-0 Haiti; Morocco 1-1 Brazil; knockout path stakes for both.
Morocco favored -130; defensive structure and Brazil draw show elite tournament level vs Scotland limited WC pedigree.
Scotland may defend deep if trailing to protect GD; Morocco wait-and-strike transition style.
Morocco R1: high press direct style; 49% poss xG 1.37; Saibari goal; competitive vs Brazil.
Scotland R1: direct set-piece approach; 46% possession xG 1.05; narrow win vs Haiti.
Morocco expect to dominate ball; Scotland working on better possession after Haiti.

eventflow_process_summary.summary: EventFlow 先将赛前信号映射为 6 个激活剧本，再按 balanced 模式进行比分族加权；当前主线为双方战术互相牵制，进入僵持、小组赛积分形势导致接受平局/控节奏、高压陷阱制造前场失误。赛前可用证据 6 条，A/B级主证据 6 条，真实数据占比 97%。
eventflow_process_summary.fusion_weight_note: 最终融合使用 V2概率引擎 50% + EventFlow事件流 50%；本摘要只解释 EventFlow 侧，不改变最终分数。

scenario_activation_path.name: 双方战术互相牵制，进入僵持
scenario_activation_path.interpretation: 该剧本主要抬升 0-0、1-0、0-1、1-1 等比分族。

scenario_activation_path.interpretation: 该剧本主要抬升 0-0、1-1、1-0、0-1 等比分族。

scenario_activation_path.interpretation: 该剧本主要抬升 1-0、2-0、2-1、3-1 等比分族。

scenario_activation_path.interpretation: 该剧本主要抬升 2-0、3-0、3-1、4-1 等比分族。

scenario_activation_path.interpretation: 该剧本主要抬升 1-2、2-2、2-3、1-3 等比分族。

scenario_activation_path.interpretation: 该剧本主要抬升 1-0、2-0、2-1、1-1 等比分族。

risk_checks: 若开场无早球、红牌、点球或明确战术错位，开放式/大比分剧本应动态下调。
若赛前证据不足或多为C级摘要证据，EventFlow只作为排序辅助，不能替代V2校准概率。
当前估算数据占比 3%，需要在报告中显式披露。
